evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Business Laptop x2 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added two units of the cheapest qualifying business laptop (under $1200, >=16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, 14–15.6", rating>=4.0) to the cart.

evaluators.name: Custom CRM Integration Quote Request
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a CRM integration software quote request with the correct budget range, next-month start date, and phone as preferred contact.

evaluators.name: On-site Workstation Maintenance Booking
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked workstation maintenance for 10–20 devices next month, on a morning timeslot between the 10th and 20th, with office location details.

evaluators.name: Cheapest 24/7 + On-site IT Support Plan Signup
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started sign-up for the cheapest active IT support plan that includes both 24/7 support and on-site visits, and filled initial company info.

evaluators.name: Save Overheating Server KB Article in Folder
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved a troubleshooting knowledge base article about server overheating for a server model, and organized it into a 'Server Issues' folder.

evaluators.name: Accessories Cart with Keyboard, Mouse, Cable and SAVE10
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added one qualifying keyboard, mouse, and cable accessory (each under $50, >=4 stars, free shipping) to the cart and applied the SAVE10 promo code.

evaluators.name: Cloud Migration Training/Webinar Registration
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered one seat for a future cloud migration training/webinar, with Eastern Time (UTC-05:00) and Intermediate level.

evaluators.name: Custom Rack Server Configured and Quoted
evaluators.description: Checks that the user configured a rack server with >=32GB RAM, >=2TB storage, a 3-year maintenance plan, total price between $3,000 and $4,000, added it to a quote cart, and submitted a server quote request.
